overall.description: A cinematic nighttime drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera travels along wet highways and neon-lit urban canyons, passing futuristic billboards and the iconic Arasaka sign on the hillside.

events.description: vehicle with headlights approaches and passes on the left
camera begins turning right toward the neon building complex

agents.ego_description: driving along the highway shoulder, approaching a neon-lit building complex with cyan illumination

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past on the highway, headlights cutting through the rain

entered.detail: circular building wrapped in bright cyan neon lights with vertical Japanese signage
metal guardrail with integrated orange LED lighting strips reflecting on wet surface
futuristic city towers visible through the rain and night haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked highway at night, with the camera driving forward along the right shoulder. A distinctive cylindrical building wrapped in cyan neon dominates the right side, while the distant city skyline glows through the haze. A vehicle passes by on the left, its headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial district with overhead signage and overpasses

events.description: enters the dense neon district, moving under overpass structures
passes under large overpass, temporarily obscuring the sky

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit urban canyon, passing under overpasses and between towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements

entered.detail: elevated highway passing between buildings creating a covered corridor
dense array of holographic advertisements and neon signs with Japanese characters
large vertical cyan neon arrow pointing upward on building facade
traditional Asian architectural roof elements atop futuristic structures

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow urban canyon, leaving the open highway behind. The scene becomes enclosed by towering buildings covered in dense neon signage and holographic advertisements. The camera passes under an overpass structure, moving through a sheltered corridor of cyberpunk architecture with traditional Asian design elements mixed with futuristic neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway transitioning from commercial district to open road

events.description: exits the dense neon district back onto the open highway
dark sedan passes by on the highway ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the dense urban signage recedes into the background, returning to open road

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead on the wet highway, taillights visible through rain

entered.detail: returning to the roadside guardrail with continuous orange lighting
tall street lamps illuminating the road through the heavy rainfall

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the enclosed neon district, transitioning back to the open highway. The dense cluster of billboards and overpass structures fall behind as the road opens up. Street lamps line the left side of the road, cutting through the rain, while a vehicle drives ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside highway with corporate signage and natural terrain

events.description: large illuminated Arasaka sign becomes visible on the hillside ahead
navigating a long left curve along the hillside

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding hillside road, approaching and passing the illuminated Arasaka corporate sign

entered.detail: massive illuminated corporate logo sign mounted on the hillside, visible through the rain
dense trees and shrubs covering the embankment alongside the highway
winding multi-lane road with double yellow lines curving through the terrain

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a winding hillside highway away from the urban core. The road curves through terrain lined with trees and street lamps, with the massive illuminated Arasaka sign dominating the hillside view. The camera navigates the wet curves as the sign gradually shifts from center to the right side of the frame, maintaining the rainy cyberpunk atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rain-slicked highway into a dense neon urban canyon before winding away toward a hillside landmark. It begins by driving along a wet shoulder past a cyan-wrapped cylindrical building, with the distant city skyline glowing through a hazy night. As the camera turns right, the open road gives way to an enclosed corridor of towering buildings and holographic advertisements, passing under an overpass where futuristic architecture blends with traditional Asian design. The scene then opens back onto the highway as the dense cluster of billboards recedes, leaving street lamps to cut through the rain while a lone vehicle drives ahead. Finally, the road curves away from the urban core and winds through a tree-lined hillside, where the massive illuminated Arasaka sign dominates the view as the camera navigates the wet bends.
